name: Greenbirar Peach Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Ripe Peaches (about 4 cups - roughly chopped, reserve the juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peaches and the sour cream in a blender and blend until a puree.
2. Add the reserved peach, pineapple, orange, and lemon juices, as well as the sherry, and blend until very smooth.
3. Transfer to a bowl, cover, and chill thoroughly (at least 2 hours).
4. Ladle into chilled bowls, garnish with mint sprigs, and serve either as a first course or dessert.
